attacking_style: Long-range breakaway specialist capable of leading efforts for 200km+, then mixing with sprinters in reduced bunch finishes. Exploits third-week fatigue and cobbled attrition rather than explosive late moves.
team_tactics: Willing domestique who seizes opportunistic breakaway opportunities when team leadership allows. Self-sufficient in long efforts without apparent heavy team support.
terrain_preference: Cobbled classics and flat attritional stages where time-trial engine and criterium handling skills provide advantage. Thrives in reduced sprint scenarios after selective racing rather than pure mass sprints.
vulnerability: Limited observations suggest pure climbing stages absent from palmares. Relies on field attrition rather than raw acceleration to compete in finales.
key_patterns: Performs best in attritional racing: cobbled classics eighth, third-week TdF ninth (2 instances)
Time-trial engine enables ultra-long breakaways (200km+) and survival in reduced groups (2 instances)
Criterium/handling skills translate to positioning advantage in chaotic finishes (2 instances)
Switches between domestique duties and personal opportunities based on race situation (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent ability to finish top-10 in attritional scenarios from 2017-2018, but no evidence of progression to podium-level results
